problem: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography
mechanism: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics
hypothesis: If Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics is applied to —, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Security audit with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
